# Koobiq Angular

> Koobiq is an open-source design system for designers and developers, focused on designing products related to **information security**.

## Navigation

- [GitHub](https://github.com/koobiq/angular-components/blob/19.5.0)
- [Issues](https://github.com/koobiq/angular-components/issues)

## main

- [installation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/koobiq/angular-components/refs/tags/19.5.0/docs/guides/installation.en.md)
- [versioning](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/koobiq/angular-components/refs/tags/19.5.0/docs/guides/versioning.en.md)
- [theming](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/koobiq/angular-components/refs/tags/19.5.0/docs/guides/theming.en.md)
- [typography](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/koobiq/angular-components/refs/tags/19.5.0/packages/components/core/styles/typography/typography.en.md)
- [schematics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/koobiq/angular-components/refs/tags/19.5.0/docs/guides/schematics.en.md)
- [migration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/koobiq/angular-components/refs/tags/19.5.0/docs/guides/migration.en.md)
